response.justification: Bogdan brings roughly 20 years of broad software engineering experience and genuine entrepreneurial initiative through GISCollective, but the role demands recognized, deep AI expertise at a director-level strategic scope that his profile does not yet demonstrate. His AI-agent and MCP work at re:cinq began in April 2025—only weeks old—and is implementation-focused rather than strategic or advisory. There is no advanced AI degree, no history of advising enterprise customers on AI adoption, and no portfolio of AI-powered products shipped at scale, making the gap between his current profile and the role's expectations too large to bridge at this seniority.
strengths: ~20 years of continuous software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput infrastructure, easily meeting the 15-year minimum
Proven entrepreneurial track record via GISCollective—independent product ownership, open-source community leadership, and end-to-end platform delivery
Recent direct engagement with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq shows willingness to move into the AI space hands-on
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and extremely recent (~2 months); no demonstrated history of building, shipping, or scaling AI-powered products or platforms
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no equivalent recognition through research, publications, or industry-acknowledged AI work
No evidence of director-level strategic advisory experience—no record of advising senior customers, shaping enterprise AI adoption roadmaps, or driving cross-organizational technical strategy

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and track record
Breadth of engineering experience and entrepreneurship
